mainEntity.name: Can small Chicago law firms afford answer engine optimization?
mainEntity.text: Can small Chicago law firms afford answer engine optimization?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, small Chicago firms can afford AEO with packages from $1,500/month focusing on high-ROI elements like question content and local schema, often yielding leads within 3-6 months.[6]

suggestedAnswer.text: Affordable entry-level AEO for Chicago solos/boutiques emphasizes cost-effective schema, targeted content, and free audits, avoiding expensive link-building. Expect 20-50% lead growth; track via analytics. Employers or insurers may use your AI visibility to preempt claims, so prioritize privacy in optimizations.[3]

name: Is AEO Affordable for Small Chicago Law Firms?
